description: Remote agent workers discover and use local Ollama directly for inference. Control plane through nexus, data plane always local.

phases.description: Make CodePhase respect HEX_PROVIDER=ollama and call local Ollama directly
phases.name: CodePhase local Ollama override

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/pipeline/code_phase.rs, when HEX_PROVIDER=ollama is set, call OLLAMA_HOST/api/generate directly with the prompt instead of POST /api/inference/complete on nexus. Extract code from response, return as StepResult. This bypasses the nexus inference endpoint entirely.
tasks.name: Add local Ollama path to CodePhase::execute_step

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/agent.rs worker function, on startup before entering poll loop: probe OLLAMA_HOST/api/tags for available models. Log discovered models with sizes. Set HEX_PROVIDER=ollama and HEX_MODEL to best available model if not already set.
tasks.name: Worker startup inference discovery

tasks.description: Create a swarm task from Mac coordinator. Bazzite worker claims it, generates code via local Ollama (not tunnel), runs compile gate, reports compile=true back to nexus. Verify with hex report swarm.
tasks.name: E2E: worker generates code with local Ollama + compile=true

phases.description: Workers report available models to coordinator for intelligent task routing
phases.name: Worker capability reporting

tasks.description: After worker registers via /api/hex-agents/connect, POST available models and estimated tok/s to /api/hex-agents/{id}/capabilities. Nexus stores in SpacetimeDB agent_registry.
tasks.name: POST worker capabilities to nexus on connect

tasks.description: In execute_plan_distributed, before creating tasks, query worker capabilities via GET /api/hex-agents/capabilities. Assign T2.5 tasks to workers with 27B+ models. Assign T1 to any worker.
tasks.name: Coordinator reads capabilities for task assignment
